name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.9.6 reflects Google's March 2026 core update by downgrading FAQ/HowTo/Review schema scoring on non-primary pages (these schema types now only earn rich results on dedicated FAQ/how-to/review pages; applying them as supplements to other content may be treated as a spam signal). Reviewer schema rubric now emphasizes Article + Organization + entity-rich JSON-LD + LLMs.txt companion file. v3.9.5 split Phase 6 internal linking into three categories (topical/commercial/conversion) with brand_pages schema, real inline Word hyperlinks color-coded by category, Appendix D internal link map, and dropped the 'no site structure = full credit' reviewer free-pass. v3.9.4 fixed pipeline orchestration to invoke subagents via Task tool and added generate-docx.py for real Word output. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog, self-critique meta-pass, optional voice calibration. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs.
